basic_details.job_title: JNV Banaskantha Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Teacher, Expert and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha (JNV Banaskantha) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Teacher, Expert, and Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA) posts! Published on the official website https://www.navodaya.gov.in, this recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga/M.P.Ed., B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed., Female Graduate with 3 years experience in self-defense, Certificate/Diploma in Indian Classical/folk Dance, Certificate/Diploma in relevant field (musical instruments), SSC (Class XII) with computer skills.
qualification.details: Yoga Teacher: Any Graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga/M.P.Ed. with Yoga Specialisation from a recognized university. Sports coach: B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed. with specialization in any game from a recognized university. Trainer for Girls for Self Defense: A female Graduate with 3 years of experience in coaching self-defense. Dance Expert: Certificate/Diploma in any of the Indian Classical/folk Dance from a recognized university. Instrument Expert: Certificate/Diploma in a relevant field (any instrument like Flute, Tabla, Sitar, Violin, Guitar, Congo) from a recognized university. Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA): SSC (Class XII) from a recognized Board and possessing a minimum speed of 30 words per minute in English or 25 words per minute in Hindi computer-based typing. OR Passed +2 level of Senior Secondary from CBSE/State Board with secretarial practices and office management as a vocational subject.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Trainer for Girls for Self Defense

salary_details.details: Salary will be AS PER SAMITI NORMS.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNV Banaskantha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 04 June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in JNV Banaskantha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Teacher/Expert posts in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the JNV Banaskantha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from SSC (Class XII) for Junior Secretariat Assistant to Graduate degrees for other teaching and expert roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JNV Banaskantha Teacher/Expert posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will be as per SAMITI NORMS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha located?
faq.answer: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha is located in Banaskantha, Gujarat, with the pincode 385505.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their biodata, original testimonials with one set of self-attested copies, one passport-size photograph, and personal ID proof.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is from 09:30 AM to 10:30 AM on 04 June 2026.
